rings.label: Alignment
rings.hint: How closely agent behavior tracked your intent

findings.title: Missing dev/test quick-start instructions
findings.body: The harness-dreams project has no CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md guidance, so the agent had to probe the codebase to discover basic commands like pnpm install, pnpm lint, pnpm check, and pnpm test before scaffolding. Adding a standard validation workflow would eliminate this discovery overhead in future sessions.
findings.improvement:
## Validation
- Run `pnpm install` to install dependencies.
- Run `pnpm lint` to check formatting and linting.
- Run `pnpm check` to typecheck.
- Run `pnpm test` to run the test suite.
- Run `pnpm build` to build all packages.
- Verify all commands pass before committing.
findings.agentBenefit: The CLI runner writes the missing durable instruction before the next session.
findings.userBenefit: You spend fewer turns correcting the same behavior.
findings.reflection: Whether alignment improves after this managed change is accepted.
findings.evidence: Now initialize git, install dependencies, and verify the baseline works end-to-end.
findings.configGap: No documented validation workflow for new contributors or agents
findings.action:
Add rule: ## Validation
- Run `pnpm install` to install dependencies.
- Run `pnpm lint` to check formatting and linting.
- Run `pnpm check` to typecheck.
- Run `pnpm test` to run the test suite.
- Run `pnpm build` to build all packages.
- Verify all commands pass before committing.

patch.label: CLAUDE.md · harness-dreams
patch.snippet:
<!-- harness-dreams:claude:start -->
## Harness Dreams — Claude guidance

Apply these user-approved recommendations from the latest Sleep Cycle:

- ## Validation
- Run `pnpm install` to install dependencies.
- Run `pnpm lint` to check formatting and linting.
- Run `pnpm check` to typecheck.
- Run `pnpm test` to run the test suite.
- Run `pnpm build` to build all packages.
- Verify all commands pass before committing.
<!-- harness-dreams:claude:end -->

findings.title: Astro site scaffolding skill
findings.body: The agent spent significant effort reading the reference Astro site structure, copying patterns for astro.config, wrangler.jsonc, layouts, pages, and styles. A reusable skill capturing the standard Astro + Cloudflare Workers pattern would accelerate future site scaffolding tasks.
findings.improvement: Use when scaffolding a new Astro site for Cloudflare Workers deployment. Provides the standard structure including astro.config.mjs with static output, wrangler.jsonc with custom domain routes, SiteLayout.astro with SEO meta tags, global.css with dark theme baseline, robots.txt.ts and sitemap.xml.ts generators, and a 404.astro page. Reference the existing apps/site pattern in harness-dreams or appliedintelligence-team repos.
findings.agentBenefit: The CLI runner writes the missing durable instruction before the next session.
findings.userBenefit: You spend fewer turns correcting the same behavior.
findings.reflection: Whether alignment improves after this managed change is accepted.
findings.evidence: Let me study the reference Astro site to match its patterns.
findings.configGap: No skill for scaffolding Astro sites with Cloudflare Workers deployment
findings.action: Scaffold skill: Use when scaffolding a new Astro site for Cloudflare Workers deployment. Provides the standard structure including astro.config.mjs with static output, wrangler.jsonc with custom domain routes, SiteLayout.astro with SEO meta tags, global.css with dark theme baseline, robots.txt.ts and sitemap.xml.ts generators, and a 404.astro page. Reference the existing apps/site pattern in harness-dreams or appliedintelligence-team repos.
